name: Grandma's Cornbread Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Hot chicken broth (or 3 cups if needed)
1/2 tsp Salt OR 2 chicken bouillon cubes added to hot chicken broth
1/2 tsp Black pepper (or more, to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. For Cornbread: Combine all ingredients in a well-greased 10-inch pan. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees F (230 degrees C) for about 4 minutes until hot. Bake at 450 degrees F for about 30-35 minutes or until lightly browned. Allow to cool, then crumble the cornbread into a large bowl.
2. For Dressing: Sauté celery and onion in butter until tender. Combine cornbread, crackers, sautéed vegetables, and remaining ingredients in a bowl, mixing well. If the dressing is not moist enough, add about 1 cup of hot milk. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan or casserole dish. Bake at 450 degrees F for 25-30 minutes until lightly browned. (For Pyrex dishes, bake at 375-400 degrees F.)
